question: when was the last time anyone was on the moon
answer:
The last time anyone was on the moon was during the Apollo 17 mission in December 1972, when astronauts Eugene Cernan and Harrison Schmitt spent about three days on the lunar surface. No human has returned to the moon since then.

question: what is the maximum data rate for the 802.11a standard select one
